description: Competitive landscape by category. Rather than fabricate 100 shallow company profiles (10 countries x 10), this is a defensible synthesis of well-known global leaders per category (which collectively span US/CN/JP/KR/SG/DE/UK/FR/IN/AU) plus the recurring, widely-reported customer complaints and the resulting NIRVA opportunity. Specific pricing/features must be re-validated before use in sales material.
disclaimer: Company names are illustrative market references from public knowledge; 'common_complaints' are generalized industry themes, not claims about any specific firm's current product.

categories.nirva_opportunity: Frontline-first, fast-to-deploy OS for labour-intensive service businesses; 'bring your mess' migration vs 6-18 month ERP projects.

common_complaints: Not localized for Thai/SEA (PDPA, มอก.)
categories.nirva_opportunity: Compliance for physical, labour-intensive operations (cleaning/FM/security) + PDPA/Thai localization + one-evidence-many-standards engine (standards_kb).
Integrity-grade verification (geo+liveness+device) tied to CONTRACT headcount + audit trail + executive view — not just a timeclock.
Unified workforce + asset + compliance for the FM SERVICE PROVIDER (not just the asset owner).
NOVA = domain-grounded agents (HR/ISO/Procurement/Finance) on a governed knowledge graph with audit trail and AI governance (ISO 42001).

common_complaints: Needs clean data first (most SMEs lack it)
categories.nirva_opportunity: Decision-ready executive layer with AI briefing + early-warning on data NIRVA itself captures clean at the edge — no data-engineering project required.

common_complaints: Becomes a graveyard of stale docs
categories.nirva_opportunity: Knowledge tied to live operations & evidence (SOP→task→proof), lessons-learned loop, succession/handover — ISO 30401 in practice.
Service-industry QMS integrated with workforce verification and the universal control library.

meta_gap: Across every category the recurring gap is the SAME: point solutions that don't connect operations → integrity → compliance → intelligence, and that ignore the deskless, labour-intensive service workforce in emerging markets. That whitespace is NIRVA's wedge.
